sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me track all the configurations I've seen
# Let me also look at the history to find the initial state

# First, let me check the initial state from history
if len(history) > 0:
    init_frame = history[0].frame
    init_ascii = init_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    print("=== Initial left blocks ===")
    for r in range(18, 44):
        line = init_ascii[r][7:22]
        if any(c not in 'c' for c in line):
            print(f"  {r}: {line}")
    
    print("\n=== Initial right panel ===")
    for r in range(16, 23):
        print(f"  {r}: {init_ascii[r][40:57]}")
    for r in range(33, 40):
        print(f"  {r}: {init_ascii[r][40:57]}")

# Now let me try clicking on the red shape to make the red block vertical
print("\n=== Clicking on red shape ===")
predict(expect_change=True, note='Click on red shape to toggle red block orientation')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 18, 'col': 48}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Left blocks after clicking red ===")
for r in range(18, 44):
    line = ascii_lines[r][7:22]
    if any(c not in 'c' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")

print(f"\n  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
